title: Autonomy Phase 1: Internal signal plumbing (timer → runtime → planner)
description:
## Source
`Data/Pages/Tasks/memorysmith_llm_autonomy_design_2026-06-29.md` — Phase 1

## Scope
Wire all non-chat triggers into the same runtime path. Timer emitter using `ITimeProvider`, signal sink, wake logging, deduplication, suppression cooldowns.

## Deliverables
- Signal envelope type
- Runtime signal sink
- Timer emitter using `ITimeProvider`
- Wake logging (reason, goal ID, accepted/suppressed)
- Wake deduplication
- Suppression cooldowns

## Exit criteria
- Timer wakes can be simulated in tests
- A timer wake can reach the planner
- No duplicated planning on repeated timer ticks
